title: Diuris striata

intro: Diuris striata, commonly known as the Striped Donkey Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including urinary problems, thanks to its diuretic properties, which help to increase urine production and alleviate symptoms such as edema and urinary retention. The bioactive constituents of Diuris striata include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Diuris striata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support kidney function and overall urinary health.
